data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch data from the Portal Odbiorcy Enea. Minimum 30 minutes, default 8h 30min.
data_description.fetch_consumption: Enable to show energy consumed sensors and import hourly statistics for the Energy Dashboard.
data_description.fetch_generation: Enable to show energy returned (exported) sensors and import hourly statistics. Disable if you have no solar panels or other generation source.
data_description.fetch_power_consumption: Enable to import hourly power consumed statistics (kW).
data_description.fetch_power_generation: Enable to import hourly power returned statistics (kW). Disable if you have no solar panels or other generation source.

error.at_least_one_fetch_type: At least one of consumption or generation statistics must be enabled.

user.title: Connect to Portal Odbiorcy Enea
user.description: Enter your login credentials for portalodbiorcy.operator.enea.pl

select_meter.title: Select Energy Meter
select_meter.description: Choose the energy meter (PPE) to monitor

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch data from the Portal Odbiorcy Enea. Minimum 30 minutes, default 8h 30min.
data_description.fetch_consumption: Enable to show energy consumed sensors and import hourly statistics for the Energy Dashboard.
data_description.fetch_generation: Enable to show energy returned (exported) sensors and import hourly statistics. Disable if you have no solar panels or other generation source.
data_description.fetch_power_consumption: Enable to import hourly power consumed statistics (kW).
data_description.fetch_power_generation: Enable to import hourly power returned statistics (kW). Disable if you have no solar panels or other generation source.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Enea
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid (e.g. password was changed). Please enter your current login details.

reconfigure_confirm.title: Update Enea credentials
reconfigure_confirm.description: Enter your new login credentials for the Portal Odbiorcy Enea.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Portal Odbiorcy Enea. Please check your internet connection.
error.at_least_one_fetch_type: At least one of consumption or generation statistics must be enabled.

refresh.name: Refresh meter
refresh.description: Manually fetch the latest data from the Portal Odbiorcy Enea. If no device is specified, all configured meters are refreshed.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The meter to refresh. Leave empty to refresh all meters.

backfill.name: Backfill statistics
backfill.description: Import historical statistics from the Portal Odbiorcy Enea for a custom date range. Use start_date/end_date for an explicit range, or days_back for a relative range from yesterday. Defaults to the last 30 days if no range is specified.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The meter to backfill. Leave empty to backfill all meters.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: First day to import (inclusive). Use with end_date. Takes precedence over days_back.

end_date.name: End date
end_date.description: Last day to import (inclusive). Defaults to yesterday when start_date is provided.

days_back.name: Days back
days_back.description: Number of days to go back from yesterday. Ignored when start_date is provided.
